name: Chocolate Mousse Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mix and bake according to directions. Cool for 10 minutes. Remove from pan and cool completely. Place on serving platter.
2. Spread cake with 1/3 cup ice cream topping. Chill until needed. Set aside.
3. For the mousse, melt semisweet chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat; remove from heat. Stir in powdered sugar, liqueur, and egg yolks. Cook and stir over medium heat for 2 minutes or until mixture coats a metal spoon. Remove from heat and cool completely.
4. Beat 1/2 cup whipping cream to soft peaks. Stir half of the chocolate mixture into the whipped cream. Pour the remaining chocolate into the whipped cream. Cover; chill until mixture mounds. Spread onto cake, within 1 inch of the edge. Chill, covered for several hours.
5. To serve, drizzle cake with 1 tablespoon topping. Using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip, pipe 1/2 cup whipped cream around the cake edge and garnish with raspberries, if desired.
